sn35.237:0.3: The Simile of Hands and Feet (2nd)
sn35.237:1.1: "Bhikkhus, when there are hands, there is picking up and putting down …
sn35.237:1.2: "So too, bhikkhus, when there is the eye, pleasure and pain arise internally with eye-contact as condition … . When there is the mind, pleasure and pain arise internally with mind-contact as condition.
sn35.237:1.3: "When, bhikkhus, there are no hands, there is no picking up and putting down …
sn35.237:2.2: "So too, bhikkhus, when there is no eye … no mind, no pleasure and pain arise internally with mind-contact as condition."
